Title: Continues the New York state geological survey as a bureau within the New York state science service
Summary: Continues the New York state geological survey, originally established in 1836, as a bureau within the New York state science service; establishes the purposes and goals of the New York state geological survey.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to continuing the New York state geological survey as a bureau within the New York state science service
